description: New infrastructure projects extracted from Twitter data and verified via web research

name.en: J. Anbazhagan Flyover (T. Nagar Steel Flyover)

media.photoCaption: 1.2 km steel flyover connecting South Usman Road to CIT Nagar

sources.title: News9Live - Chennai's first major steel flyover at T Nagar inaugurated
The News Mill - Tamil Nadu CM inaugurates J. Anbazhagan Flyover
The Daily Jagran - Chennai First Steel Flyover

projects.notes: 1.2 km length; 53 steel pillars; 3,800 tonnes of steel; 6.5m above ground; 30m deep foundation; Two-way traffic; 120m entry ramp from T. Nagar bus terminus; 100m exit ramp to commercial zone; 6m service road with pedestrian footpaths; Named after late DMK senior leader J. Anbazhagan; Benefits 40,000 vehicles and 2 lakh residents daily; Reduces travel time from 45 mins to 5 mins

budget.notes: Contract signed by CMAML (Chennai Metro Asset Management Limited)

timeline.completionNotes: Foundation laid January 22, 2026; Completion expected in 2 years

sources.title: Live Chennai - CMAML Signs Rs 167.08 Crore Contract for Mandaveli
Swarajya - Chennai Set For Two New Transit-Oriented Developments
Mylapore Times - Multi-modal transport hub around Mandaveli Metro station

projects.notes: Integrated with Chennai Metro Phase 2 Corridor 3; Two multi-storeyed blocks; Tower A: ground to 7 floors for office/commercial use; Basement parking for 184 two-wheelers and 96 cars; Entry/exit structures of underground metro station inside existing MTC bus terminus; Part of Transit-Oriented Development (TOD) initiative by CMRL and TIDCO

budget.notes: Built by ELCOT on National Highway 544

media.photoCaption: Six-storey IT park with 2.94 lakh sq ft

sources.title: News Today - Stalin inaugurates Elcot facility worth Rs 158 cr in Kovai
The South First - ELCOT IT Park in Coimbatore
TN IT Department - Coimbatore Vilankurichi

projects.notes: 2.94 lakh sq ft total area; 1.56 lakh sq ft IT space; Six-storey building; Two basements for parking; Expected to generate 3,500 IT jobs; Seven IT companies given allotment orders; Startup IT companies to be accommodated under co-working system; Future expansion: Two more buildings on remaining 17.17 acres at Rs 2,000 crore creating 35,000 jobs

name.ta: கோவை மெட்ரோ ரயில் நில கையகப்படுத்துதல் (முதல் கட்டம்)

budget.notes: First phase allocation by CMRL for 1.1 km stretch

sources.title: Swarajya - CMRL Allocates Rs 154 Crore For Land Acquisition For Coimbatore Metro
Construction World - CMRL to Begin Land Acquisition for Coimbatore Metro by March 2025
Constro Facilitator - CMRL allocates Rs 154 crore for land acquisition

projects.notes: 24-metre-wide strip from Textool flyover to Surya Hospital Junction; 1.1 km stretch on Coimbatore-Sathyamangalam Road; Coordinated with National Highways road widening (3.1 km); Additional Rs 2 crore sanctioned for detailed land plan survey; Part of broader Coimbatore Metro Rail project

sources.title: Kallakurichi District Government - District Collector Office Inspection
Kallakurichi District Government - CM Inauguration
Thanthi TV - Kallakurichi Collectorate Inauguration

projects.notes: Built on 39.81 acres; Part of Rs 1,773.67 crore district development projects; CM distributed welfare assistance to 2,16,056 beneficiaries during inauguration; Modern government office complex for newly formed Kallakurichi district

name.en: Anna Heavy Vehicle Cargo Terminal (Integrated Truck Terminal)
name.ta: பேரறிஞர் அண்ணா கனரக சரக்கு வாகன முனையம்

budget.notes: Also referred to as Rs 129 crore Integrated Truck Terminal

sources.title: Tiruchirappalli District Government - CM Inauguration News
BuildWatch News - CM Stalin Opens Rs 522 Crore Trichy Transit Hubs
Live Chennai - Trichy IBT and Truck Terminus

projects.notes: Part of Rs 522 crore Trichy Transit Hubs project; Inaugurated alongside Kalaignar Integrated Bus Stand (Rs 408 crore) at Panjapur; Also foundation laid for Rs 75 crore Periyar Vegetable and Fruit Market; Named after C.N. Annadurai; Major logistics hub for Trichy region

sources.title: Dinakaran - CM Stalin laid foundation stone for Madurai Central Prison
Wikipedia - Madurai Central Prison

projects.notes: Phase I construction includes central prison building, 113 prison staff quarters, cement concrete road and security perimeter wall; Part of Rs 274.67 crore police and emergency services infrastructure announced on July 31, 2025; Also included police buildings (Rs 27.59 cr), fire stations (Rs 13.54 cr), prison buildings (Rs 60 lakh), forensic drug testing units (Rs 3.74 cr)

budget.notes: Part of Greater Chennai Corporation sports infrastructure

sources.title: Adyar Times - CM Stalin inaugurates Rs 14.66 Cr projects

projects.notes: Upgraded facilities for cricket, basketball, volleyball, badminton, and table tennis; Part of Rs 14.66 crore sports infrastructure projects including 4 fitness parks (Rs 11.46 cr) at Minjur, Vellanur, Varadarajapuram, and Thirunageswaram; Foundation laid for Rs 255.60 crore new projects
